config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary, because that is how abuse and unfairness start. In my view, the proper role of society is to protect people and create order without crushing personal freedom and dignity. From my own perspective, a healthy society is one that balances the common good with strong protections for the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Masyarakat memang perlu aturan, keamanan, dan tujuan bersama, tetapi hak individu bukan penghalang bagi kebaikan publik; justru itu batas yang mencegah mayoritas menindas minoritas. Kalau hak pribadi bisa dikesampingkan setiap kali dianggap “demi masyarakat,” maka kebebasan berbicara, kebebasan beragama, dan perlindungan hukum bisa cepat terkikis. Bagi saya, kepentingan umum penting, tetapi harus dicapai tanpa mengorbankan martabat dan kebebasan dasar setiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia we have also seen how “for the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence or conformity. Social harmony matters, but harmony that ignores personal dignity is not real harmony; it is just control with a polite name. Public interests and individual rights should be balanced, and rights should only be limited in narrow, clearly justified cases such as public safety or preventing harm to others. If society becomes the priority in every situation, the weakest people are usually the first to lose their voice.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari pengalaman nilai-nilai di Amerika Serikat, alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan kebebasan berbicara, beragama, dan perlindungan hukum, padahal justru hak individu itulah yang membatasi kekuasaan mayoritas. Saya juga setuju bahwa kepentingan umum penting, tetapi pembatasan hak hanya layak dalam kasus yang sempit dan benar-benar perlu, seperti keselamatan publik atau mencegah kerugian langsung pada orang lain. Kalau tidak, yang paling mudah dikorbankan biasanya bukan kelompok kuat, melainkan orang-orang yang suaranya paling lemah.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I reject the statement, because in Indonesia “for society” has too often been used to pressure people into silence, conformity, or unfair treatment. The common good matters, but it is not a blank check to override rights whenever the majority or the state claims a higher purpose. Real social order comes from protecting dignity, speech, religion, and due process, not from asking individuals to surrender them for vague collective goals. If society is prioritized in every case, the people with the least power are usually the first to be sacrificed.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu karena menurut saya di Amerika Serikat, begitu “kepentingan masyarakat” dijadikan prioritas mutlak, terlalu mudah bagi pemerintah atau mayoritas untuk menginjak hak yang justru harus dilindungi. Poin tentang harmoni sosial memang penting, tetapi saya tidak percaya harmoni yang dibangun dengan membungkam kebebasan berbicara, beragama, atau due process bisa disebut baik. Kepentingan umum seharusnya dicapai dengan batas yang jelas: mencegah bahaya nyata, bukan memakai alasan kabur untuk mengorbankan orang yang paling lemah. Bagi saya, hak individu bukan lawan dari masyarakat; hak itu adalah pagar agar masyarakat tidak berubah menjadi alat penindasan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
